tools.name: get_presentation
tools.description: Retrieve presentation metadata, including slides/pages and elements.

tools.name: get_page_thumbnail
tools.description: Get a thumbnail image for a page (slide) in a presentation.

tools.name: create_presentation
tools.description: Create a new presentation with optional initial title.

tools.name: batch_update
tools.description: Send a batchUpdate request to modify presentation structure and content.

tools.name: append_text_to_title_of_slide_index
tools.description: Append text to the title shape of the specified slide (slideIndex, default 0).

tools.name: replace_text_first_match
tools.description: Replace text for the first match anywhere in the presentation.

tools.name: style_text_first_match
tools.description: Apply text style to the first match of given text.

tools.name: insert_shape_after_first_match
tools.description: Insert a rectangle shape near the first match of text on a slide.

tools.name: insert_image_after_first_match
tools.description: Insert an image near the first match of text on a slide.

tools.name: create_slide_after_first_match
tools.description: Create a new slide after the slide that contains the first text match.

tools.name: set_background_color_for_slide_index
tools.description: Set background color for a slide by index.
